action.reasoning: Observation: Starting with empty workspace, no prior metrics. Analysis: Must follow first-iteration rule to establish baseline with simple DKT (LSTM) model for KT task, few epochs, and immediate eval submission to validate pipeline + measure time. Decision: Implement DKT with hidden=128, 5 epochs, proper masking for padded seqs, BCELoss on next-step skill preds, log metrics to jsonl, save best on val AUC; test predict.py contract locally via same logic.
